tracks.meaning: the act of pressing a computer mouse button or touchpad to select or activate something on a screen
a sharp sound made by something striking against something else
to move quickly or suddenly with a clicking sound
a sharp consonant sound produced by the tongue against the roof of the mouth, used as a linguistic element in some African languages
to become suddenly clear or understandable to someone
a sudden moment of understanding or realization
a sharp sound produced by the joints or bones of the body during movement
an instance of a user clicking on an advertisement or link on a website, used in measuring online engagement
